channel.title: Asterisk on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Asterisk on Pi Stack

item.title: FusionPBX vs FreeSWITCH vs Asterisk: Self-Hosted Call Center Software Guide 2026
item.description: Running a call center on proprietary platforms like Five9, Talkdesk, or Amazon Connect means your customer conversations flow through third-party infrastructure — with per-agent pricing that scales into thousands of dollars per month. Self-hosted call center software gives you complete control over call routing, queue management, agent monitoring, and customer data while eliminating recurring licensing costs.
